raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I purchased a cell phone from XXXX XXXX. When the order arrived it was not a cell phone, I received mascara. I immediately called XXXX XXXX to resolve, they said I needed to mail back the mascara in order to receive a refund. Photos showing what I received were sent to them. They sent me a shipping label that did not work at any of the local shipping companies. I emailed them and informed and no other label was provided. Since they refused to refund without this step I disputed the charge with American Express and provided the photos showing I did nit receive the cell phone I paid for. After reviewing and discussing with XXXX, American Express overturned the dispute and rebilled me for the phone I didnt receive and asked me to take it up with XXXX XXXX XXXX I again reached out to XXXX XXXX who said to submit my ID and refund would be processed. I did this same day and then received an email saying I was outside the XXXX  day window and there was nothing they could do. Both parties are refusing to help despite having proof that I did not receive the item and because they sent me back and forth for so long now they are saying it has been too long. I spoke with a XXXX at american express who also said they can no longer reopen the dispute because of the time frame. They mailed the notice to a wrong address so I never received the notice of the decision and by the time I received the electronic notice I could not dispute the decision.
